name: LAF Local LLM Routing Knowledge Pack
description: Reusable engineering rules harvested from evaluating local Ollama models across sprints and building the LocalModelRouter. Captures the governing principle that local models are reviewers, planners and proposers only — never unguarded code writers — together with a role roster, the reasoning-model token-budget lesson for deepseek-r1, role-based routing, health probing via /api/tags, graceful degradation when Ollama is absent, the requirement that core tests pass without a model, prompt-budget and timeout discipline, per-call logging, prompt-and-response audit capture, and the rule that an accepted model finding must become a code fix, test, knowledge item or backlog item. Each item carries an implementation, test and generator implication plus an honest boundary. All items are original summaries; no third-party text is reproduced.
license: Original professional summaries of local-LLM orchestration and governance practices, authored for LocalAIFactory. Free to deploy and modify within the application. No vendor documentation or third-party copyrighted material is reproduced verbatim. Principles are framed with confidence levels; no certification is asserted.
